entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,213Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 131

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,787Chapters: 10/13Kudos: 110

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: theleftoveryou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,169Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

entry.title: You’re all the courage i need
entry.summary:
Author: the0writers0ghost

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,163Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 41

Summary: 1,300 years after the death of the once and future king and Merlin is living a mundane domestic life in central London. Until a vision strikes him and Arthur is once again back in his life. Thus follows a modern AU which sees Arthur repress feelings like there is no tomorrow and Merlin being so done with his shit. Enjoy!

entry.title: Firebug
entry.summary:
Author: seraknockiddy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,233Chapters: 4/13Kudos: 3

Summary: A series of mysterious fires has been terrorizing the small town of Colchester for months now. Uther Pendragon, the incumbent mayor, finds this anything but amusing - especially so close to the town's bi-thousandth anniversary celebrations. Consequently, he has no choice but to call in outside help to restore peace to his beautiful town (and ensure his re-election next year). Arthur - his son and the chief of the local fire department - is far from thrilled at the prospect of being scrutinized by a conceited big-city inspector. Not that he has anything to hide, mind you; in fact, he feels he has had the situation quite well under control on his own - until another fire nearly costs one of his crew members their life ...

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,884Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.

entry.summary:
Author: GaiussArchedEyebrow (RedBlackandTartan)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,700Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 6

Summary: After reports of a rampaging magical boar terrorizing Camelot, Uther sends Arthur and Merlin, along with mysterious newcomer, Sir Cai, to complete a complex series of tasks needed to kill the creature. Along the way, Merlin notices Sir Cai also has magic, and is very exposed in his usage of it, making him anxious about hiding his own nature from Arthur.Or: Merlin gets jealous of a super cool and hot fae man.

entry.title: Yo ho and a bottle full rum
entry.summary:
Author: Theroundbartable

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,987Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 116

Summary: After over a thousand years of waiting, thinking he found Arthur again only to learn he'd been completely fooled several times, Merlin spends most of his time drunk at sea. The legend is fake, the story of Arthur has been distorted by time and the current King is a massive asshole. Merlin's life as the cheap pirate Dragoon, however, is disrupted when Sir Leon thinks he found him. The King's son, Arthur, named after the legendary King, might be the one.or - the pirate reincarnation au no one asked forReminder: no parts in this series are connected

entry.title: Beast Like Me
entry.summary:
Author: lindenwaverly

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,214Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 65

Summary: The man was beautiful. Hair as gold as dawn sunlight, eyes like the endless blue depths of a midsummer afternoon. His face was a marble angel’s, the lines of brow and cheek and jaw almost too mathematically perfect. Every good sculptor always knew to put in a flaw. His was in his front teeth, just a little too large, and it made Merlin dig his fingernails into his palms. He was lithe, muscular, dressed in black. Half-dressed - his jerkin was unbuttoned, his shirt open nearly to his navel, and he was missing a sock. His hair had the raked-through look of a man in crisis. His smile was dazzling and mad. “This,” he said, spreading his hands, “is the magnificent - nay, the opulent court of the Crown Prince of Camelot!” And then, very pleasantly - “Gaius, what the fuck is this?” OR - When Merlin goes to find Gaius, he's told that he's left Camelot. Tracing his would-be mentor, Merlin finds himself at a tumbledown castle on the edge of a hill. There are chickens, radishes, a knight who'd much rather focus on his squash and a strange voice calling in the night. And a secret hidden in the heart of Castle Perilous. The secret behind the most important rule: don't bleed.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Merlin (Merlin)

  • Cursed Arthur
  • Enemies to Lovers
  • Dumb young guys trying to deal with The Horrors
  • Arthur is extremely poorly socialised
  • He's the equivalent of that girl who wrote a note to her girl crush telling her to get out of her school
  • Merlin is eighteen and generally furious
  • You will figure out the plot twist much sooner than he does but give him a break
  • He doesn't know what genre he's in
  • fairytale inspired
  • Fluff and Angst
  • Humor
